headline: LKQ Publishes 2025 Global Sustainability Report
summary: ANTIOCH, Tenn., May 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LKQ Corporation (Nasdaq: LKQ) today announced the release of its 2025 Sustainability Report. The report highlights the Company’s commitment to driving profitable growth through efficient, responsible, and ethical business practices, and demonstrates a disciplined approach to risk management across its operating segments. The report outlines LKQ’s three-pillar strategy: (i) delivering sustainable solutions profitably, (ii) people-led performance, a
